ai_context: CtxGov checks local AI-facing context for stale claims and reports evidence spans. The example is synthetic and makes no benchmark claim.
v0.6.3 is prepared as a local GitHub release draft. Package publication and CLI migration remain out of scope.
The project page links to local benchmark staging and states that there is no public benchmark result yet.
Security policy says CtxGov is not a vulnerability scanner and current examples should not include secrets.
The benchmark skeleton contains synthetic cases, labels, a regex baseline, a scorer, and limitations.
Outreach draft asks for taxonomy feedback and explicitly says there is no security guarantee or universal benchmark claim.
